films.title: Om Shanti Om
films.overview: Reincarnated 30 years after being killed in a suspicious on-set fire, a small-time actor is determined to punish the person who ignited the blaze.

films.title: Jawan
films.overview: An emotional journey of a prison warden, driven by a personal vendetta while keeping up to a promise made years ago, recruits inmates to commit outrageous crimes that shed light on corruption and injustice, in an attempt to get even with his past,  and that leads him to an unexpected reunion.

films.title: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani
films.overview: On a trekking trip, an introverted Naina falls for a charming ex-classmate, whose thirst for adventure drives them apart. Years later, their paths cross again.

films.title: Chennai Express
films.overview: Rahul embarks on a journey to a small town in Tamil Nadu to fulfill the last wish of his grandfather: to have his ashes immersed in the Holy water of Rameshwaram. En route, he meets a woman hailing from a unique family down South. As they find love through this journey in the exuberant lands of South India, an unanticipated drive awaits them.

films.title: Happy New Year
films.overview: Six would-be thieves enter a prestigious dance competition as a cover for their larger goal of pulling off a major heist.

films.title: Piku
films.overview: A taxi driver is caught between a dysfunctional relationship between a woman and her father as he drives them to Kolkata.

films.title: Bajirao Mastani
films.overview: Peshwa Bajirao married to Kashibai, falls in love with Mastani, a warrior princess in distress. They struggle to make their love triumph amid opposition from his conservative family.

films.title: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
films.overview: Xander Cage is left for dead after an incident, though he secretly returns to action for a new, tough assignment with his handler Augustus Gibbons.

films.title: Padmaavat
films.overview: Rajputana, India, 13th century. The tyrannical usurper Alauddin Khilji, sultan of Delhi, becomes obsessed with Queen Padmavati, wife of King Ratan Singh of Mewar, and goes to great lengths to satisfy his greed for her.

films.title: Pathaan
films.overview: A soldier caught by enemies and presumed dead comes back to complete his mission, accompanied by old companions and foes.
